expression, "Hail to the Rudras". Then the king should feed Brah-

connection the Daksina (votive gift) prescribed by the wise, who
are interested in the welfare of the people, to ward off the evil
consequences of the portents of trees, is in the form of gifts of
land.

(4) Portents of Crops

If the stalk of lotus, barley (or wheat, PriyaAgu etc.), has one
or two branches, it forebodes death to its owner. So does a twin
flower or fruit.

If the growth of crops is too excessive, and if many varieties
of flowers and fruits grow on a single tree, there will undoubtedly
be an invasion by a foreign army.
